name: worker_skill
description: Stateless read-only sub-agent for isolated analysis tasks. Invoked by CPE, SIL (drift check), or auto/cron. Has read-only access to the workspace via file_reader only.

task.description: Task description to give the worker sub-agent.

persona.description: System prompt / persona for the worker. Defines their role (Analyst, Debugger, etc).

context.description: Additional background data or context for the task.
